properties.validation_message: Enter the pixel dimensions that the image should be cropped to (ex. 100x100)

product_missing_long.value: This item was not found. Be sure that you have entered a valid product code or try a different value.

product_unavailable_long.value:
This item is unable to be purchased. It is likely out-of-stock or it has an invalid attribute selection.

Remove the row or try a different attribute combination.

body.value: Copy & paste or type out a list of products & quantities to load into the quick-add.
Upload a CSV file with the product-codes & quantities you'd like to import.

description:
## Quick Order
A streamlined ordering tool that allows customers to quickly add multiple products to their cart without navigating through individual product pages. Ideal for B2B buyers or frequent shoppers looking for efficiency.
name: Quick Order
